zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II於大約1255年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，他的父親Jean de Dampierre I29歲，母親Laure de Lorraine22歲。他和Isabeau de Brienne至少有3個女兒。他去世於1307年11月11日享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II于大约1255年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，他的父亲Jean de Dampierre I29岁，母亲Laure de Lorraine22岁。他和Isabeau de Brienne至少有3个女儿。他去世于1307年11月11日享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II was born about 1255, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Jean de Dampierre I, was 29 and his mother, Laure de Lorraine, was 22. He had at least 3 daughters with Isabeau de Brienne. He died on 11 November 1307, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II est né environ 1255, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Jean de Dampierre I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Laure de Lorraine, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Isabeau de Brienne. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1307, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II um 1255 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Dampierre I 29 und seine Mutter Laure de Lorraine 22. Er hatte mit Isabeau de Brienne mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1307 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II è nato il circa 1255 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Dampierre I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Laure de Lorraine, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Isabeau de Brienne. Morì il 11 novembre 1307, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França: フランスグランド エストアウベダンパエア
ja.Brabant, Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼ
ja.Dampierre, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, King: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベダンパエア
ja.Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイス
ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre-Flandre IIが約1255年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Jean de Dampierre Iは29歳，母Laure de Lorraineは22歳であった。彼はIsabeau de Brienneとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1307年11月11日に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II(이)가 대략 1255년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Dampierre I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Laure de Lorraine(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Isabeau de Brienne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 11월 11일 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Jean de Dampierre I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Laure de Lorraine, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Isabeau de Brienne. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1307, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II родился около 1255 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Dampierre I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Laure de Lorraine, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Isabeau de Brienne. Он умер 11 ноября 1307 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

sm.from 1258 to 1270: mai le 1258 e o'o I le 1270

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II nació aproximadamente 1255, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Jean de Dampierre I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Laure de Lorraine, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Isabeau de Brienne. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1307, a la edad de 53 años.
